name: Almond Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the cooked rice aside.
2. Combine the TVP® with the hot water and ketchup. Mix well.
3. Set aside.
4. Saute the onion in the peanut oil until translucent.
5. In a 2-quart casserole, mix together the rice, TVP®, sauteed onions, and almonds.
6. Add the remaining ingredients and stir to combine.
7. Cover with foil for oven baking at 350°F for 30 minutes. For microwave use, cover tightly with plastic wrap and heat on high for 10 minutes.
8. For a mushroom variation: replace the almonds with 1 cup sliced fresh shiitake mushrooms and bake as above.
Per serving: 246 cal; 12 g prot; 32 g carb; 9 g fat
The TVP® Cookbook by Dorothy Bates/MM by DEEANNE
